288 I1F I1F_CON_HEART_FAIL (I1F) Congestive Heart Failure CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - heart/circulation - congestive heart failure. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
289 I1FF I1FF_MANIC_DEPRES (I1FF) Manic Depression Bipolar Disease CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - psychiatric/mood - manic depressive (bipolar disease). 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
